FIELD SERVICE & COMMERCIAL CONTROL

Keep approved work, billing & payment in sync.

Clear Build connects quotes, approvals, change orders, invoices, and payments to every job — so owner-led remodelers stop losing money between approved work and collected payment.

THE CONNECTED CHAIN
LeadQuoteApprovalChange orderInvoicePayment
FEATURES

Everything you need to keep approved work, billing & payment in sync

The first four are the wedge — formal commercial control most contractor tools blur over. The rest keep the day-to-day moving.

Quotes & Change Orders

Create professional quotes, capture approval, and keep change orders formally linked to the original job.

01

Invoices & Online Payments

Send invoices, collect payments online, and track paid, due, and overdue amounts clearly.

02

Project-Linked Financial Control

Keep quotes, invoices, payments, and updates tied to the same job so nothing gets lost.

03

Approval Proof

Capture quote and change-order approvals digitally so billing disputes are easier to prevent.

04
ALSO INCLUDED

Leads & Client Pipeline

Track prospects and customers from first contact through signed work without spreadsheet chaos.

Scheduling & Team Coordination

Assign work, track upcoming jobs, and keep the team aligned without bloated dispatch software.

HOW IT WORKS

Built for how remodelers actually work

Five connected steps — the approval and change-order bridge most tools skip is right in the middle.

  1. 1

    Add leads and client details

    Capture leads manually or import them, and keep every opportunity in one place.

  2. 2

    Create and send professional quotes

    Build itemized quotes quickly and send them for digital approval.

  3. 3

    Capture approval and manage change orders

    Keep proof of what was approved and handle changes formally before they affect billing.

  4. 4

    Turn approved work into invoices

    Create invoices from approved work so commercial details stay connected.

  5. 5

    Track projects, payments & next actions

    See what's active, what's paid, and what still needs attention across every job.

STEP 1 / 5

Add leads and client details

Capture leads manually or import them, and keep every opportunity in one place.

Stays linked to the same job

QUOTE #1042 · DRAFT

Maple St. Kitchen Remodel

Client: Dana & Marc Whitfield · 128 Maple St.

Line itemQtyRateAmount

Cabinetry — shaker, painted1$8,600$8,600
Quartz countertop & install42 sf$78$3,276
Tile backsplash1$1,520$1,520
Add line item
Subtotal$15,796
Tax (estimated)$1,204
Total$16,000
GET PAID FASTER

Get paid faster without losing track of approved work

Payment speed tied to the actual wedge: every invoice traces back to what the client approved.

  • Create invoices directly from approved workNo re-keying — billing inherits the approved scope and change orders.
  • Clients pay online by cardA pay link on every invoice, so money moves faster.
  • Accept partial paymentsTake a deposit now, collect the balance on completion.
  • Automatic overdue remindersStop chasing payments manually — Clear Build nudges for you.

$18,400
$8,400 due
From approved quote + change order #2

QUOTE · CHANGE ORDER · INVOICE · PAYMENT — all linked
PROJECTS

Keep every job, invoice & payment connected

Not generic “project organization.” Every dollar and decision stays tied to the work it belongs to.

  • Link quotes, change orders, invoices, and payments to one job
  • Track budget vs invoiced and collected amounts in real time
  • Keep team updates and project history in one timeline
  • Stop approved work from slipping through the cracks
Track your first job free

BEST FIT

Built for owner-led remodeling businesses

  • Owner-operators running $500K–$5M remodeling businesses
  • Remodelers tired of losing track of approved quotes, changes, and invoices
  • Contractors who want to look more professional to clients
  • Teams of 1–15 who don’t need bloated enterprise software
  • Businesses moving off spreadsheets, email chains, and generic tools

Fast setup

Be quoting in an afternoon, not a quarter.

Private business workspace

Your jobs, clients, and money — kept to your team.
